headline: Lockheed Martin Stock Rises 10.8% in 6 Months: More Upside Ahead?
summary: LMT gains from a $186.4B backlog, F-35 demand and global defense deals, but program delays and high debt may keep new investors cautious.

headline: This “UFO” ETF Is Among the Few Real Ways To Invest In The Space Economy
summary: If you have ever tried to buy “space exposure” through an ETF, you have probably noticed the same trick. Most space funds quietly fill the bucket with Boeing (NYSE:BA), Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT), and Honeywell (NASDAQ:HON), then call it a day. You end up with aerospace primes when what you wanted was the companies actually launching rockets and beaming ... This “UFO” ETF Is Among the Few Real Ways To Invest In The Space Economy

headline: Kratos: Strong Growth, But The Market Demands More Than A Good Story

headline: Space Stock ETFs Are Suddenly Hot. Only 1 Owns SpaceX Before the IPO.
summary: There are a bunch of space-themed ETFs, a mix of actively managed and index funds. But just one has access to SpaceX ahead of its eagerly awaited debut.
